zh-CN.name: 钱包
zh-CN.intro: 钱包是我们随身携带的小袋子，可以装钱和卡片。它软软的，有拉链或扣子，保护里面的东西不掉出来。

story.title: 💰小小钱包的旅行
story.body: 小兔有一个红色的钱包，每天跟着它出门。一天，钱包悄悄说：小兔，今天我们带什么呀？小兔打开钱包，放进三枚硬币、一张妈妈的照片和一张画着小花的卡片。钱包鼓鼓的，开心地说：好满足呀！他们先去面包店，钱包打开嘴巴，吐出一枚硬币，换了一个热乎乎的面包。然后去公园，小兔掏出卡片，在秋千上画下蓝天。晚上回家，小兔摸摸钱包：谢谢你，今天辛苦了。钱包笑弯了拉链：不辛苦，跟着你到处走，看到好多好玩的东西，我最喜欢旅行啦！小兔把钱包放在枕头边，一起进入了甜甜的梦乡。

knowledge.title: 钱包里可以装什么？
knowledge.body: 钱包可以装钱、卡片、照片等小东西。它让我们出门时方便携带重要的物品，不容易弄丢。材质通常是布或皮革，有拉链或按扣保护安全。

en.name: Wallet
en.intro: A wallet is a small pouch we carry with us. It can hold money and cards. It is soft and has a zipper or button to keep things safe.

story.title: 💰Little Wallet's Adventure
story.body: Bunny has a red wallet and takes it everywhere. One day, the wallet whispered, "Bunny, what shall we take today?" Bunny opened the wallet and put in three coins, a photo of Mommy, and a card with a little flower. The wallet was plump and said happily, "I'm so full!" First, they went to the bakery. Wallet opened its mouth, spit out a coin, and got a warm bread. Then they went to the park. Bunny took out the card and drew the blue sky on the swing. In the evening, Bunny patted Wallet: "Thank you, you worked hard today." Wallet smiled and its zipper curved: "Not hard at all. Following you around, I saw so many fun things. I love adventures!" Bunny placed Wallet by the pillow, and they drifted into a sweet dream together.

knowledge.title: What can you put in a wallet?
knowledge.body: You can put money, cards, photos, and other small items in a wallet. It helps you carry important things safely when you go out. Wallets are usually made of cloth or leather and have a zipper or snap to keep everything secure.
